title: lithocarpus lucidus
intro: Lithocarpus lucidus, also known as the Chinese cork tree or Liuzhou cork tree, is a deciduous tree species native to southern China. Traditionally, Lithocarpus lucidus has been used in Chinese medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The bark and leaves of the tree have been used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, and are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Lithocarpus lucidus is often used in traditional Chinese medicine in the form of decoctions, infusions, and tinctures.
